variants.modifierDescription: Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.
Only secondary weapons may be used in this mission, any other weapon type is not allowed, and will be removed automatically if equipped.
Any damage received will impart radiation effects, and so will green clouds around the tileset.

activeChallenges.desc: Deploy an Air Support Charge in a Mission
activeChallenges.title: Air It Out

activeChallenges.desc: Pierce and kill 2 or more enemies in a single Bow shot
activeChallenges.title: Two For One
